fields.name: Architect
fields.description: Creative design, building plans, permits, and spatial expertise for residential and commercial spaces.

fields.name: Building Contractor
fields.description: Licensed contractors to manage and execute construction works from foundation to finishing.

fields.name: Surveyor
fields.description: Quantity surveying, cost estimation, land boundary surveys, and property valuations.

fields.name: Structural Engineer
fields.description: Structural design, analysis, load calculations, and safety assessments for any build.

fields.name: Construction Manager
fields.description: End-to-end project management ensuring quality, timeline, and budget adherence.

fields.name: Landscaper
fields.description: Outdoor design, garden planning, irrigation, and green space transformation.

fields.name: Amara Osei
fields.bio: Award-winning architect with 12+ years designing sustainable spaces across East Africa. Specialises in blending modern aesthetics with local materials and climate-responsive design principles.

fields.name: James Kariuki
fields.bio: Licensed building contractor specialising in large-scale residential complexes and office buildings. Over 18 years delivering projects across Nairobi and Central Kenya, with a reputation for quality and punctuality.

fields.name: Dr. Fatuma Mwangi
fields.bio: Registered surveyor offering precise quantity surveying, cost estimation, and land boundary services. PhD in Geomatics from University of Nairobi. Trusted by developers across the Coast region.

fields.name: Eng. David Otieno
fields.bio: Structural engineer with expertise in high-rise buildings, bridges, and earthquake-resistant design. Registered with the Engineers Board of Kenya. Has worked on landmark projects in Kisumu and Nairobi.

fields.name: Grace Njoroge
fields.bio: PMP-certified construction manager delivering projects on time and within budget since 2015. Manages multi-contractor sites and specialises in residential estates and mixed-use developments.

fields.name: Samuel Waweru
fields.bio: Creative landscaper transforming outdoor spaces with indigenous plants and modern design principles. Certified landscape architect with a passion for sustainable and water-wise gardens.

fields.name: Aisha Abdullahi
fields.bio: Passionate about blending Swahili coastal aesthetics with contemporary architecture. Has designed boutique hotels, upscale residences, and cultural centres across Kenya and Tanzania.

fields.name: Peter Muthoni
fields.bio: Veteran contractor with vast experience in roads, drainage systems, and public infrastructure. Has completed projects for county governments and national agencies across the Rift Valley region.

fields.name: Eng. Rose Kamau
fields.bio: Specialist in complex foundation systems and soil analysis for challenging terrains. Has resolved structural problems on existing buildings and designed foundations for high-rises in Nairobi's CBD.

fields.comment: Amara designed our family home beautifully. She listened to all our requirements and produced plans that exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended!
Professional, creative and very detail oriented. The 3D visualisations she provided helped us understand the final look before construction started.
James completed our 4-bedroom house on time and within budget. His team was professional and the workmanship was top quality. Would hire again.
Dr. Mwangi's quantity survey saved us a lot of money by identifying areas where we could optimise costs without compromising quality.
Grace managed our commercial project with great skill. Communication was excellent and she kept all contractors aligned. Minor delays early on but overall very impressed.

fields.name: Alice Wambua
fields.message: I need an architect to design a 5-bedroom residential house on a 1/2 acre plot in Karen. Budget is around KSh 15 million for construction.

fields.name: Robert Maina
fields.message: Looking for a contractor to renovate our office space on the 3rd floor of a building in Westlands. Approximately 2000 sq ft. Need it done within 6 weeks.
fields.admin_notes: Called client on 22nd March. Forwarded details to James Kariuki.

fields.name: Mary Achieng
fields.message: We have a large garden that needs a complete redesign. Want indigenous plants, a water feature, and a children's play area.
fields.admin_notes: Connected with Samuel Waweru. Project completed successfully.
